questions.question: What sport or activity are the people playing?
questions.rationale: Main activity visible across multiple frames with clear net setup

questions.question: What type of surface is the playing area made of?
questions.answer_key: Red or reddish-brown dirt or clay court
questions.rationale: Distinctive surface visible in all frames, affects gameplay context

questions.question: What structures or barriers are visible around the playing area?
questions.answer_key: Green fencing and metal net divider
questions.rationale: Key environmental features defining the court boundaries

questions.question: How many players are actively visible on the court?
questions.rationale: Helps listener understand game setup and team configuration

questions.question: What natural features are present in the setting?
